message:
fix(ops): rustfmt cleanup and extend schema migration test coverage

app: Apply rustfmt to assert macro formatting in control-plane alert
tests (nested is_some_and closures).

storage: Add seed_project_and_instance_named/seed_second_project_and_instance
test helpers for multi-project SLO rollup scenarios. Add slo_rollups and
anomaly_materializations to bootstrap schema table assertion list. Add
SLO rollup indexes to bootstrap index assertion list. Update migration
row count assertion to match OPS_SCHEMA_VERSION instead of hardcoded 1.
Rename test to bootstrap_creates_schema_tables_and_indexes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
